codexGoal.actualCodexGoal: Execute .omo/plans/20260610-inference-optimization-harness.md until verification and completion. User-visible deliverable: production-grade autonomous inference optimization harness CLI for nninference with uv-managed Python, budget tiers 3h/6h/9h/12h, dry-run state/report artifacts, optional LM Studio skip-with-reason comparator, correctness gate planning, claim-boundary reports, worklog audit, RED→GREEN tests, tmux manual-QA artifacts, final review, and verified milestone commits.
